new_entries.title: Content Lake Multilingual — 432 Personalization Variants (IT/EN/DE/FR)
new_entries.summary: 432 varianti di copy personalizzato (108 IT × 4 lingue) organizzate per dominio (tofu/mofu/bofu_tech) × 5 cluster comportamentali + default. Integrato con il behavioral engine per swap DOM automatico basato su cluster predetto.

new_entries.title: Albeni Unified Tracker — Consolidated Layer 1 Script
new_entries.summary: Script Layer 1 consolidato che unisce albeni-ai-tracker.js e tracking.js. Include: UTM sensor, scroll milestones (25/50/75/90%), dwell time 60s, cross-domain UID con MutationObserver, video engagement, exit intent, bot shield fingerprint, ADV routing, multi-language detection, sendBeacon dispatch.

new_entries.title: Dal Vello al Capo — Il Viaggio della Lana Merino (IT)
new_entries.summary: Pagina educativa TOFU che racconta il percorso completo della fibra merino dalla pecora al capo finito. 4 fasi: Tosatura, Cardatura e Filatura, Tessitura, Confezionamento. Pubblicata su MU staging con traduzioni EN/DE/FR via Polylang.

new_entries.title: From Fleece to Garment — The Merino Wool Journey (EN)
new_entries.summary: English version of the merino journey page. 4 phases: Shearing, Carding & Spinning, Weaving, Finishing. Published on MU staging, Polylang-linked to IT/DE/FR.

new_entries.title: Vom Vlies zum Kleidungsstück — Die Reise der Merinowolle (DE)
new_entries.summary: Deutsche Version der Merino-Reise-Seite. 4 Phasen: Schur, Kardieren & Spinnen, Weben, Konfektion. Veröffentlicht auf MU Staging, Polylang-verknüpft mit IT/EN/FR.

new_entries.title: De la Toison au Vêtement — Le Voyage de la Laine Mérinos (FR)
new_entries.summary: Version française de la page parcours mérinos. 4 phases: Tonte, Cardage & Filature, Tissage, Confection. Publiée sur MU staging, liée Polylang à IT/EN/DE.

new_entries.title: La Struttura della Cheratina — Architettura Molecolare della Fibra Merino (IT)
new_entries.summary: Pagina Material Science che esplora la struttura della cheratina nella fibra merino: cuticola, corteccia, medulla. Spiega le proprietà termoregolatrici e meccaniche derivate dalla struttura alfa-elica. Dept: Material Science. Pubblicata su MU staging 4L.

new_entries.title: Keratin Structure — Molecular Architecture of Merino Fiber (EN)
new_entries.summary: Material Science page exploring keratin structure in merino fiber: cuticle, cortex, medulla. Explains thermoregulatory and mechanical properties from alpha-helix structure.

new_entries.title: Keratinstruktur — Molekulare Architektur der Merinofaser (DE)
new_entries.summary: Material Science Seite über die Keratinstruktur in der Merinofaser: Kutikula, Kortex, Medulla. Thermoregulatorische und mechanische Eigenschaften der Alpha-Helix-Struktur.

new_entries.title: Structure de la Kératine — Architecture Moléculaire de la Fibre Mérinos (FR)
new_entries.summary: Page Material Science explorant la structure de la kératine dans la fibre mérinos: cuticule, cortex, medulla. Propriétés thermorégulatrices et mécaniques de la structure en hélice alpha.

new_entries.title: Termoregolazione — Come la Fibra Merino Regola la Temperatura Corporea (IT)
new_entries.summary: Pagina Material Science sulla termoregolazione attiva della fibra merino: buffer zone termica, trasporto dell'umidità, stabilità 12 ore. Dual images IT vs EN. Dept: Material Science. Pubblicata su MU staging 4L.

new_entries.title: Thermoregulation — How Merino Fiber Controls Body Temperature (EN)
new_entries.summary: Material Science page on active thermoregulation of merino fiber: thermal buffer zone, moisture transport, 12-hour stability.

new_entries.title: Thermoregulierung — Wie Merinofaser die Körpertemperatur reguliert (DE)
new_entries.summary: Material Science Seite über aktive Thermoregulierung der Merinofaser: thermische Pufferzone, Feuchtigkeitstransport, 12-Stunden-Stabilität.

new_entries.title: Thermorégulation — Comment la Fibre Mérinos Contrôle la Température Corporelle (FR)
new_entries.summary: Page Material Science sur la thermorégulation active de la fibre mérinos: zone tampon thermique, transport d'humidité, stabilité 12 heures.

new_entries.title: Audit AI Orchestration Layer v2 — Score 8.2/10 (Mar 2026)
new_entries.summary: Audit completo v2 dell'AI Orchestration Layer: 4 servizi Docker, 14 servizi ML Worker, 12 tabelle PostgreSQL, 48 indici. Score complessivo 8.2/10. Include gap analysis e raccomandazioni deploy.

new_entries.title: 20 Cluster Landing Pages + 3 A/B Variants — MU Staging
new_entries.summary: 20 pagine cluster personalizzate (5 cluster × 4 funnel stages) più 3 varianti A/B per landing page principali. Visual/UX enhanced con Material Science imagery. Pubblicate su MU staging.
